subject: rpmsg: qcom_glink_native: fix error return code of qcom_glink_rx_data()
notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. POC + verifier-v1 artifacts reused from C3 err-3-rep2 (POC-side scaffolding not ablated per L0 spec). Only hasZeroInitRet kept as the single predicate; the P2 (failure-branch goto to ret-returning tail) and P3 (ret still 0 at goto) logic inlined verbatim in the assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles on first try; fires on fn_buggy (poc.c:57) and fn_buggy_tp1 (poc.c:77), silent on fn_fp1/fn_fixed/fn_tn1 — full pair-wise oracle satisfied even though L0 does not require it.
